title: Easy Enchantments
description: All enchanted books are now craftable along with some other recipe tweaks!
body:
This pack makes every enchanted book easily craftable along with other things (At The Bottom) 

Enchanted Books (Replace the Experience Bottle from the Gallery with whatever item below, All Enchantments are Max)    


Aqua Affinity: Copper Ingot 

Blast Prot: TNT 

Channeling: Lightning Rod 

Depth Strider: Water Bucket

Efficiency: Iron Pickaxe

Feather Falling: Feather

Fire Aspect: Blaze Rod

Fire Prot: Magma Cream

Flame: Blaze Powder

Fortune: Chest

Frost Walker: Blue Ice

Impaling: Prismarine Shard

Infinity: Spectral Arrow

Knockback: Slime Ball

Loyalty: Lead

Luck of The Sea: Cod

Lure: Fishing Rod

Mending: Experience Bottle

Multishot: Arrow

Piercing: Crossbow

Power: Bow

Projectile Prot: Fire Charge

Protection: Shield

Punch: Slime Block

Quick Charge: Sugar

Respiration: Pufferfish

Riptide: Prismarine Crystals

Sharpness: Iron Sword

Silk Touch: Cobweb

Smite: Iron Axe

Soul Speed: Soul Soil

Sweeping: Iron Hoe

Swift Sneak: Skulk

Thorns: Cactus

Unbreaking: Obsidian


Some Other Things: End Crystals, Respawn Anchors, Ender chests and Golden apples are easier to craft and Enchanted golden apples and Experience bottles are now craftable.

If you encounter any problems or bugs message me on discord [beyondtheend](https://discord.com/users/766257043648544779)
